# MERN Personal Finance Tracker - Copilot Instructions

This is a full-stack MERN application for tracking personal finances with features including:
- User authentication (JWT-based)
- Transaction management (income/expenses)
- Budget tracking and analytics
- Data visualization with charts
- Expense categorization
- Monthly reports

## Project Structure
- `/server` - Node.js/Express backend with MongoDB
- `/client` - React frontend application
- `.env` - Environment variables
- `package.json` - Root package for managing both client and server

## Development Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start both client and server in development mode
- `npm run server` - Start only backend server
- `npm run client` - Start only frontend app

## Key Technologies
- Backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Mongoose, JWT
- Frontend: React, Axios, Chart.js, Tailwind CSS
- Database: MongoDB Atlas or local MongoDB
